circuits.circuitId: Unique identifier for each racing circuit in the database.
circuits.circuitRef: Short reference code for each circuit, aiding in quick identification.
circuits.name: Official name of the racing circuit, representing its branding and identity.
circuits.location: Geographical location of the circuit, indicating where it is situated.
circuits.country: Country where the circuit is located, providing national context.
circuits.lat: Latitude coordinate of the circuit, useful for mapping and geographical analysis.
circuits.lng: Longitude coordinate of the circuit, essential for precise location tracking.
circuits.alt: Altitude of the circuit, currently not available in the dataset.
circuits.url: Link to the Wikipedia page for detailed information about the circuit.

constructors.constructorId: Unique identifier for each constructor in the database.
constructors.constructorRef: Short reference name for each constructor, used for easy identification.
constructors.name: Full name of the constructor, representing their official title.
constructors.nationality: Country of origin for the constructor, indicating their national identity.
constructors.url: Link to the constructor's Wikipedia page for additional information.

drivers.driverId: Unique identifier for each driver in the database.
drivers.driverRef: Alphanumeric reference name for each driver, aiding in identification.
drivers.number: Driver's racing number, often used for identification during competitions.
drivers.code: Three-letter code representing the driver's team or nationality.
drivers.forename: Driver's first name, providing a personal touch to their identity.
drivers.surname: Driver's last name, essential for distinguishing between individuals.
drivers.dob: Date of birth, crucial for determining the driver's age and eligibility.
drivers.nationality: Country of origin for the driver, reflecting their cultural background.
drivers.url: Link to additional information about the driver, enhancing data accessibility.

seasons.year: Represents the specific year of the Formula One season, from 1950 to 2017.
seasons.url: Links to detailed information about each Formula One season on Wikipedia.

races.raceId: Unique identifier for each race event in the database.
races.year: Year when the race took place, spanning from 1950 to 2017.
races.round: Sequential number indicating the race's position in the championship series.
races.circuitId: Identifier for the specific circuit where the race was held.
races.name: Official name of the race, reflecting its location or title.
races.date: Date of the race in YYYY-MM-DD format.
races.time: Scheduled start time of the race, if available.
races.url: Link to the Wikipedia page for detailed race information.

constructorResults.constructorResultsId: Unique identifier for each constructor's race result entry.
constructorResults.raceId: Identifier for the specific race associated with the constructor's results.
constructorResults.constructorId: Identifier for the constructor participating in the race.
constructorResults.points: Points awarded to the constructor based on race performance.
constructorResults.status: Indicates the result status, with 'D' representing a specific condition.

constructorStandings.constructorStandingsId: Unique identifier for each constructor standings entry.
constructorStandings.raceId: Identifier for the specific race associated with the standings.
constructorStandings.constructorId: Identifier for the constructor competing in the race.
constructorStandings.points: Total points earned by the constructor in the standings.
constructorStandings.position: Rank position of the constructor in the standings.
constructorStandings.positionText: Textual representation of the constructor's rank position.
constructorStandings.wins: Total number of races won by the constructor.

driverStandings.driverStandingsId: Unique identifier for each driver's standings record in the database.
driverStandings.raceId: Identifier for the specific race associated with the driver's standings.
driverStandings.driverId: Unique identifier for each driver participating in the races.
driverStandings.points: Total points earned by the driver based on race performance.
driverStandings.position: Numeric ranking of the driver in the race, indicating finishing order.
driverStandings.positionText: Textual representation of the driver's finishing position, including letters for special cases.
driverStandings.wins: Total number of races won by the driver throughout the season.

lapTimes.raceId: Identifies the specific race event associated with the lap times.
lapTimes.driverId: Represents the unique identifier for each driver participating in the race.
lapTimes.lap: Indicates the lap number completed during the race.
lapTimes.position: Denotes the driver's position in the race at the end of the lap.
lapTimes.time: Records the lap completion time in a standard time format.
lapTimes.milliseconds: Stores the lap completion time in milliseconds for precise timing.

pitStops.raceId: Identifies the specific race event associated with the pit stop.
pitStops.driverId: Unique identifier for the driver making the pit stop.
pitStops.stop: Indicates the sequence number of the pit stop during the race.
pitStops.lap: Represents the lap number when the pit stop occurred.
pitStops.time: Records the exact time of day when the pit stop was made.
pitStops.duration: Measures the length of the pit stop in seconds.
pitStops.milliseconds: Provides the duration of the pit stop in milliseconds for precision.

qualifying.qualifyId: Unique identifier for each qualifying event in the database.
qualifying.raceId: Identifier linking to specific races, ensuring data relates to the correct event.
qualifying.driverId: Unique identifier for each driver, facilitating tracking of individual performance.
qualifying.constructorId: Identifier for constructors, representing teams responsible for vehicle design and performance.
qualifying.number: Driver's racing number, used for identification during events.
qualifying.position: Final qualifying position achieved by the driver in the event.
qualifying.q1: Time taken in the first qualifying session, formatted as mm:ss.sss.
qualifying.q2: Time taken in the second qualifying session, may be NULL if not applicable.
qualifying.q3: Time taken in the third qualifying session, often NULL if not completed.

status.statusId: Unique identifier for each status, facilitating efficient data retrieval and management.
status.status: Descriptive label representing the current state or condition of an entity.

results.resultId: Unique identifier for each race result entry.
results.raceId: Identifier for the specific race associated with the result.
results.driverId: Identifier for the driver who achieved the result.
results.constructorId: Identifier for the constructor of the vehicle used in the race.
results.number: Car number assigned to the driver during the race.
results.grid: Starting position of the driver on the grid for the race.
results.position: Final finishing position of the driver in the race.
results.positionText: Textual representation of the driver's finishing position.
results.positionOrder: Order of positions based on race results.
results.points: Points awarded to the driver based on their finishing position.
results.laps: Total number of laps completed in the race, indicating distance covered.
results.time: Total time taken to complete the race, formatted as a time string.
results.milliseconds: Total race time in milliseconds, providing precise timing for performance analysis.
results.fastestLap: The lap number where the fastest time was recorded during the race.
results.rank: Position of the racer at the end of the race, indicating performance level.
results.fastestLapTime: Time taken to complete the fastest lap, formatted as a time string.
results.fastestLapSpeed: Average speed during the fastest lap, expressed in a numeric format.
results.statusId: Identifier for the race status, indicating the outcome or condition of the racer.
